title: texas war of independence
subject: texas war of independence
program_outcome: This syllabus provides an overview of the Texas War of Independence, focusing on the people, causes, key battles, historical figures, and cultural elements.

classes.title: Introduction to the Texicans
classes.summary: This class introduces the Texicans, the settlers and inhabitants of Texas before and during the war.
terminal: Identify key characteristics of the Texican population before the war
enabling: Define who the Texicans were
Describe the demographics and cultural influences on the Texicans
Explain the Texicans' role in Texas society

classes.title: Causes of the Texas War of Independence
classes.summary: This class covers the political and social causes leading to the Texas War of Independence.
terminal: List the primary causes of the Texas War of Independence
enabling: Identify tensions between Texicans and the Mexican government
Describe the impact of Mexican laws on Texican settlers
Explain the role of cultural differences in escalating tensions

classes.title: Major Battles of the Texas War of Independence
classes.summary: This class outlines the major battles and their outcomes during the Texas War of Independence.
terminal: Summarize the key battles of the Texas War of Independence
enabling: Identify major battles such as the Battle of the Alamo and the Battle of San Jacinto
Describe the strategies used in these battles
Explain the outcomes and significance of each battle

classes.title: Historical Figures of the Texas War of Independence
classes.summary: This class introduces key figures in the Texas War of Independence and their contributions.
terminal: Identify and describe the contributions of key figures in the Texas War of Independence
enabling: List significant figures such as Sam Houston and Stephen F. Austin
Explain the roles these figures played in the war
Discuss their impact on the outcome of the war

classes.title: The Yellow Rose of Texas and Cultural Impact
classes.summary: This class explores the cultural elements of the Texas War of Independence, including the legend of the Yellow Rose of Texas.
terminal: Explain the cultural impact of the Texas War of Independence
enabling: Discuss the legend of the Yellow Rose of Texas
Analyze the war's influence on Texas culture
Identify cultural symbols and their meanings

classes.title: Sam Houston and the Rough Riders
classes.summary: This class focuses on Sam Houston's leadership and the role of the Rough Riders.
terminal: Describe Sam Houston's leadership and the role of the Rough Riders
enabling: Analyze Sam Houston's strategies during the war
Explain the contributions of the Rough Riders
Discuss the legacy of these figures in Texas history

classes.title: The Republic of Texas
classes.summary: This class covers the establishment and challenges of the Republic of Texas post-independence.
terminal: Summarize the formation and challenges of the Republic of Texas
enabling: Describe the political structure of the Republic of Texas
Identify challenges faced by the new republic
Explain how the Republic of Texas influenced future statehood
